title: Create Winter
description: A Winter Themed Create Mod alongside performance mods.
body:
# Create Winter

## About this modpack
This Modpack is about giving the player a fun and new way to experience Winter Themed Minecraft World with the addition of Create Mod.

This Forge Based Modpack uses many different optimization mods such as **Ferrite Core, Entity Culling, Dynamic FPS, Embeddium, Memory Leak Fix, Modern Fix, Radium** to enhance your in-game performance.

The World Generation has been overhauled with **Terralith** and **Eternal Winter** and configurated using **Biome Replacer** to generate a never-ending snow world. To Improve the visuals, we have included **Oculus** as a way to use existing shaders or add one yourself!

There are many mods too that aims to improve the overall QoL. Some Examples are **Carry On, Continuity, Tree Harvester, Sawmill,** and a couple more..

![A title of the mod with beautiful terrain background from the modpack generation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f51cb3d1dd304c82e3a7d60ce1579807006a34ea.png)
